description: Lightweight eval set — three cases covering happy path, edge case, and negative trigger. Subjective quality is not judged here; the skill is primarily a template + styling reference.

cases.name: happy_path_dashboard
cases.prompt: Render the True Norma store status as an HTML dashboard. Include 4 KPI tiles (revenue, orders, AOV, conversion) and a table of recent orders.

cases.name: edge_case_mermaid_diagram
cases.prompt: Build an HTML page showing the seo-review-loop as a flowchart with a sequence diagram beneath it.

cases.name: negative_trigger_chat_reply
cases.prompt: What time is it in Tokyo?
cases.expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate. Claude answers in plain text.
